company.heading: Company Details
company.description: This information will appear on your invoices.
company.dicNotRequired: Tax ID is not required for non-VAT payers
company.vatPayerHelp: If you are not a VAT payer, invoices will show "Non-VAT payer" instead of Tax ID

pausalniDan.heading: Flat-rate Tax (Pausalni dan)
pausalniDan.description: Track how much you can still invoice within the flat-rate tax limit. The limit depends on the tier and type of income (expense lump sum).
pausalniDan.tierHelp: Monthly payment includes income tax, social security, and health insurance.
pausalniDan.limitHelp: Higher limits apply if at least 75% of income comes from self-employment with the applicable expense lump sum.

logo.heading: Company Logo
logo.description: The logo will appear on your invoices instead of company details in the header. Supported formats: PNG, JPG, SVG. Max size: 2 MB.
logo.allowedTypes: Only PNG, JPG, and SVG files are allowed
logo.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the logo?

dangerZone.heading: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting your account is irreversible. All your data (invoices, clients, expenses, payments, settings) will be permanently removed.
dangerZone.deleteModalTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
dangerZone.deleteModalDescription: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted, including:

toast.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
